mnemonics: Agents ACT: Autonomous, Collaborative, Transparent. Supertools are SUPer: Seamless, User-empowering, Proactive.
keyPoints: Intelligent agents are autonomous systems that perceive and act in an environment to achieve goals.
Supertools are AI-augmented tools that amplify human capabilities, making complex tasks simpler.
A core principle of Human-Centred AI is that AI should augment and collaborate with humans, not replace them.
commonMistakes: Confusing autonomy (agents act on their own) with automation (systems follow pre-defined rules).
Designing supertools that disempower the user by making them a passive observer rather than an empowered collaborator.
